name: Splunk
description: Monitor Splunk saved searches and user accounts for monitoring and access review compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Splunk
2. Go to Settings > Tokens
3. Enable token authentication if not enabled
4. Click New Token and create a token with appropriate permissions
5. Copy and paste the token below

credentialFields.label: Bearer Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create an authentication token in Splunk > Settings > Tokens

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that Splunk saved searches are configured for monitoring and alerting

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Reviews Splunk users for access review log compliance
